productDisplayName: David Beckham Men Signature Story Deo
description: The Beckham Signature Story deodorant fragrance was created by Beatrice Piquet. The fragrance is woody and fruity with top notes of violet leaf, pineapple, orange blossom, lavender, incense and patchouli. This deodorant spray is perfect for off-duty outings in the tropical Indian weather. Quantity: 150 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
